news.t: Touchstone Investments Launches Four Distinctively Active Managed ETFs

overview.description: The Touchstone Strategic Income ETF (SIO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that holds income producing debt securities of any type, rating, and maturity, selected using a bottom-up security selection process. SIO was launched on Jul 21, 2022 and is issued by Touchstone.

data.title: Touchstone Investments Launches Four Distinctively Active Managed ETFs
data.text: Expansion into ETFs provides the potential for a more tax-efficient, cost competitive and transparent way to access Touchstone's investment strategies CINCINNATI , July 25, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Touchs...
